calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-01-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Petitioner Suzanne J. Galvez was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing petitioner's name to Zoe Galvez. Decree signed in open court.
